new_items.title: प्रधानमंत्री श्री नरेन्द्र मोदी ने लेह में तथागत के पवित्र अवशेषों की प्रदर्शनी के उद्घाटन पर प्रसन्नता व्यक्त की
पश्चिम बंगाल में निर्वाचन आयोग ने मतगणना के लिए अतिरिक्त पर्यवेक्षकों और पुलिस पर्यवेक्षकों को तैनात किया
भारतीय विदेश व्यापार संस्थान (आईआईएफटी) ने 63वें स्थापना दिवस का आयोजन किया
केंद्रीय संचार मंत्री श्री ज्योतिरादित्य सिंधिया ने 'सेल ब्रॉडकास्ट सिस्टम' (सीबीएस) का शुभारंभ किया, यह प्रणाली केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री श्री अमित शाह के मार्गदर्शन में स्वदेशी रूप से विकसित की गई है
सैनिकों के अद्वितीय शौर्य और पराक्रम ने ‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ को भारत के सैन्य इतिहास में एक स्वर्णिम अध्याय के रूप में स्थापित कर दिया: ‘शौर्य’ कार्यक्रम में रक्षा मंत्री
ऋण वसूली ढांचे को मजबूत करने के लिए डीएफएस ने डीआरएटी अध्यक्षों और डीआरटी पीठासीन अधिकारियों की संगोष्ठी का आयोजन किया
प्रख्यात गीतकार और संचार विशेषज्ञ श्री प्रसून जोशी को प्रसार भारती का अध्यक्ष नियुक्त किया गया
आत्मनिर्भर पंचायत कार्यक्रम पर जनसंपर्क कार्यशाला हैदराबाद स्थित राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण विकास एवं पंचायती राज संस्थान (एनआईआरडी एंड पीआर) में आयोजित की गई
पश्चिम एशिया में चल रहे घटनाक्रमों को ध्‍यान में रखते हुए प्रमुख क्षेत्रों पर अद्यतन जानकारी
भारतीय रेलवे ने विद्युत प्रणाली के उन्नयन और पुल आधारभूत ढांचे के लिए 895.30 करोड़ रुपये की परियोजनाओं को मंजूरी दी
एनएचएआई ने गुजरात में भारत की पहली मल्टी-लेन फ्री फ्लो टोलिंग प्रणाली की सफलतापूर्वक शुरूआत की
Important Changes Under Income Tax Act 2025 and 1961
new_items.summary:
The new law keeps depreciation methods unchanged for continuity. However, it broadens tax scope by including assets “belonging to” taxpayers beyond legal ownership.

The post Important Changes Under Income Tax Act 2025 and 1961 appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: TDS Payment Under New Income Tax Act 2025 – All You Need to Know
new_items.summary:
The new law restructures TDS provisions into Sections 392, 393, and 394, altering compliance procedures. Correct selection of codes and deductee details is crucial to avoid errors and notices.

The post TDS Payment Under New Income Tax Act 2025 – All You Need to Know appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: Tax Treatment of Dealer Benefits Under Section 194R & Income Tax Act 2025
new_items.summary:
Dealer incentives like tour packages are taxable as business income under the new law. If TDS is borne by the payer, it must be added as additional income through grossing up.

The post Tax Treatment of Dealer Benefits Under Section 194R & Income Tax Act 2025 appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: Section 68 Additions: Favourable Remand Report Shields Assessee
new_items.summary:
The issue was deletion of additions on unsecured loans treated as unexplained cash credits. The tribunal upheld deletion, holding that a favourable remand report confirming genuineness and creditworthiness weakens the Revenue’s case.

The post Section 68 Additions: Favourable Remand Report Shields Assessee appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: Reassessment Proceedings under Income Tax Act, 2025 & Rules, 2026
new_items.summary:
The new law defines strict conditions for reopening assessments using specified information categories. It ensures transparency and limits arbitrary reassessment powers.

The post Reassessment Proceedings under Income Tax Act, 2025 & Rules, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: Ease in Tax Litigation under Income-tax Act, 2025: A Structural Analysis of Procedural Reforms
new_items.summary:
The issue concerns fragmented litigation under the earlier tax regime. The new law integrates multiple proceedings into a unified process, reducing duplication. The key takeaway is that litigation is streamlined rather than eliminated.

The post Ease in Tax Litigation under Income-tax Act, 2025: A Structural Analysis of Procedural Reforms appeared first on

new_items.title: Mandatory Time Limit for Appeal Disposal Suggested Due to Huge Pendency Before CIT(A)
new_items.summary:
The issue highlights delays caused by non-binding timelines in appellate proceedings. It proposes mandatory limits to ensure faster and fair disposal of tax appeals.

The post Mandatory Time Limit for Appeal Disposal Suggested Due to Huge Pendency Before CIT(A) appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: Delay Condoned with Cost: ITAT Grants Fresh Chance, Slams Non-Compliance
new_items.summary:
The issue involved dismissal of appeal due to delay and non-appearance. The tribunal condoned the delay citing medical reasons and remanded the matter for fresh assessment, imposing cost for non-compliance.

The post Delay Condoned with Cost: ITAT Grants Fresh Chance, Slams Non-Compliance appeared first on TaxGuru.

new_items.title: Section 153C Valid but Addition Fails: No Incriminating Material = No Deemed Dividend
new_items.summary:
The issue was addition of deemed dividend under search assessment. The tribunal held that without incriminating material, additions in completed assessments are unsustainable.

The post Section 153C Valid but Addition Fails: No Incriminating Material = No Deemed Dividend appeared first on TaxGuru.
